Compare to other executive expenses that don't provide lasting value. This investment pays dividends for life. |
| 67 | Cheap programs produce cheap results — you get the transformation you pay for. | 4 | Client Case Study | Post | Dan M. tried three $99/month programs before investing in our system. Health is business infrastructure. |

Include productivity gains from improved energy and focus. |

The same resourcefulness that builds businesses can fund health transformation. |
| 71 | Free content will never get you there — implementation requires investment, accountability, and expert guidance. | 4 | Universal Story | Video | Compare two executives: one tries to learn from free YouTube videos, the other invests in proven systems. Six months later, compare their results and time invested. |

### G. Help & Support (18 angles)

You wouldn't spend 3 years trying to figure out accounting — you hire an expert. Apply the same logic to health transformation. |
| 73 | You need a coach, not another course — implementation requires accountability, not just information. | 6 | Cross-Domain Reference | Reel | Compare courses vs coaching in business context. Courses give information, coaches ensure implementation. Most executives have enough information but lack systematic implementation. |

The time cost was massive — 2 years of declining health while trying to reinvent proven solutions. |

Same with health coaching: the goal is to install systems that work without constant supervision. |

| 81 | Realistic expectations: Week 1-2 you'll feel different, Week 4-6 you'll look different, Week 8-12 others will notice the change. | 6 | Internal Case Study | Reel | Timeline based on 340 clients: energy improves first, then body composition, then external validation. Set proper expectations for transformation phases. |
| 82 | Results typically show up in this order: energy, strength, body composition, then compound effects in business and relationships. | 6 | Client Case Study | Post | Rick P.'s progression: energy improved week 2, strength gains week 4, weight loss became visible week 6, business performance improved month 3. |
| 83 | Support structure: I'm available during business hours across time zones, response time under 4 hours, emergency protocols for travel disruptions. | 6 | Personal Story | Carousel | Share how you built support systems that work for executive schedules. No waiting days for answers when you're traveling or facing schedule disruptions. |

Complexity creates failure points. Simple systems work under pressure. Executive schedules require simple systems. |

Apply the same principle to health: expertise saves time and prevents costly mistakes. |
| 88 | What I bring: proven systems and expert guidance. What you bring: commitment to implementation and willingness to follow the process. | 6 | Universal Story | Carousel | Clear partnership definition: coach provides roadmap and expertise, client provides effort and consistency. Both elements are required for success. |
| 89 | You own your results, I own the framework — success requires both elements working together. | 6 | Authority Reference | Reel | Reference personal responsibility principles. The coach can't do the workouts for you, but you can't create effective protocols without expertise. Partnership model. |

### H. Supporting Mechanisms (4 angles)

fitness-sparse.content:
# GHL Chat/SMS Automation Sequence: Reed Performance

## SEQUENCE OVERVIEW
**Trigger:** Contact sends DM keyword on Instagram
**Goal:** Qualify executives for The Executive Athlete Program ($12,000)
**Target:** Male executives age 40-55, $300K+ income, health transformation needed
**Flow:** Qualification → Education → Application

---

#### STEP 1: Initial Response

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact sends any DM on Instagram

**Time Delay:** None (immediate auto-response)

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact replies with any message: → Go to Step 2
> - IF no response after 24 hours: → Go to Step 8 (Follow-up)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: instagram-lead] | [+Add: executive-prospect]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: New Lead]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Hey there! 

I help busy executives get in the best shape of their lives without leaving their home office.

Quick question - are you currently running your own company and making $300K+ annually?

Just want to make sure you're in the right place before we dive deeper.

---

#### STEP 2: Income Qualification

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replies to Step 1

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact confirms income level: → Go to Step 3
> - IF contact doesn't meet income requirement: → Go to Step 9 (Disqualify)
> - IF unclear response: → Go to Step 10 (Clarify Income)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: income-qualified] (if yes)
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Qualifying]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Perfect. Here's the deal - most executives your level are dealing with the same bullshit.

You catch your reflection in the elevator mirror each morning and cringe. By 3pm you're running on fumes. You've bought the Peloton, hired trainers you cancel on, downloaded every app.

Sound familiar?

What's your biggest frustration with staying in shape right now?

---

#### STEP 3: Problem Identification

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact describes their fitness frustration

**Time Delay:** Wait 3 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact engages with problem discussion: → Go to Step 4
> - IF contact gives short/dismissive answer: → Go to Step 11 (Re-engage)
> - IF no response after 2 hours: → Go to Step 8 (Follow-up)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: problem-aware]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Interested]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Right. Here's what I've learned coaching 340 executives over 11 years:

The problem isn't your willpower. It's that every fitness program assumes you have unlimited time and energy.

Your Tuesday might include a 6am board call and a red-eye to Chicago. Generic programs can't handle that reality.

Quick question - how long have you been stuck in this cycle of starting and stopping fitness programs?

---

#### STEP 4: Duration of Problem

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact answers how long they've been struggling

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF 3+ years of struggle: → Go to Step 5
> - IF less than 3 years: → Go to Step 12 (Assess Readiness)
> - IF no response after 3 hours: → Go to Step 8 (Follow-up)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: chronic-problem] (if 3+ years)
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Qualified]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

That's exactly what I figured. Here's the thing - you don't need more discipline. You need a system designed for someone who runs a $500K+ company.

I've got a client, Dan M., SaaS CEO. Was 42 lbs over target, hadn't trained in 3 years. Travels 2 weeks per month.

Using my Performance Stack system, he lost 42 lbs in 6 months and now squats 2x his bodyweight. Never missed a business meeting.

Are you ready to invest in a real solution, or are you still hoping willpower will magically work this time?

---

#### STEP 5: Investment Readiness

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact expresses readiness for real solution

**Time Delay:** Wait 1 minute

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF shows investment readiness: → Go to Step 6
> - IF hesitant about investment: → Go to Step 13 (Address Investment)
> - IF no response after 4 hours: → Go to Step 8 (Follow-up)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: investment-ready]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Hot Lead]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Good. Because here's what most executives don't get:

Your health is your #1 business asset. Everything else depends on it.

You wouldn't run your company with consumer-grade software. You need enterprise solutions for your scale and complexity.

Same with fitness.

The Executive Athlete Program is $12,000 for 6 months. Custom protocols that sync with your actual schedule. Weekly video reviews. Biweekly 1-on-1 calls.

If you don't lose 20 lbs in the first 90 days following the protocol, I work with you free until you do.

Ready to see if you qualify?

---

#### STEP 6: Application Offer

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact shows interest in program details

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact wants to apply: → Go to Step 7
> - IF contact has questions: → Go to Step 14 (Handle Questions)
> - IF no response after 6 hours: → Go to Step 8 (Follow-up)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: application-ready]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Application]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Perfect. I only work with 12 active clients at a time because each person gets custom protocols and direct access to me.

Here's the application: [COACH: Insert your application URL here]

Fair warning - I'm selective. This isn't for executives looking for magic pills or quick fixes.

This is for high performers who understand that the right system makes time constraints irrelevant.

Fill out the application and if you're a good fit, we'll schedule a call to discuss your specific situation.

Either way, stop letting your Peloton collect dust. You're better than that.

---

#### STEP 7: Application Submitted

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact submits application form

**Time Delay:** Wait 10 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Application complete: → Go to Step 15 (Schedule Call)
> - Application incomplete: → Go to Step 16 (Complete Application)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: application-submitted]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Application Review]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Application received. 

I'll review your details and get back to you within 24 hours.

If you're a good fit, I'll send you a link to schedule a strategy call where we'll discuss how The Performance Stack can work for your specific situation.

Talk soon.

---

#### STEP 8: Follow-up Sequence

**Trigger Condition:**
> No response after specified timeframes in previous steps

**Time Delay:** Wait 24 hours

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact responds: → Return to appropriate step
> - IF no response after 48 hours: → Go to Step 17 (Final Follow-up)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: follow-up-needed]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Hey - saw you were interested in getting in shape without the gym dependency.

Look, I get it. You're busy running a company.

But here's the reality: your energy and health directly impact your business performance.

Dan M. told me the same thing - "I don't have time for this right now."

6 months later, he's in the best shape of his life and his team notices he's sharper in afternoon meetings.

Still interested in learning how this works?

---

#### STEP 9: Income Disqualification

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact doesn't meet income requirements

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: income-disqualified]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Disqualified]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I appreciate your interest, but The Executive Athlete Program is specifically designed for executives at the $300K+ level.

The investment and approach are calibrated for that income bracket.

I'd recommend starting with basic fitness fundamentals and revisiting this when your income grows.

Best of luck with your health goals.

---

#### STEP 10: Clarify Income

**Trigger Condition:**
> Unclear response about income level

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF clarifies and qualifies: → Go to Step 3
> - IF doesn't qualify: → Go to Step 9
> - IF still unclear: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: income-clarification-needed]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Just to clarify - are you currently making $300K+ annually from your business?

This program is specifically designed for executives at that level, so I want to make sure we're a good fit before diving deeper.

---

#### STEP 11: Re-engage Problem

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact gives dismissive answer about fitness problems

**Time Delay:** Wait 5 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact re-engages: → Go to Step 4
> - IF still dismissive: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: re-engagement-needed]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Let me be direct - if you're not actually struggling with your health and fitness, this probably isn't for you.

I work with executives who are tired of catching their reflection and feeling embarrassed. Who are exhausted by 3pm. Who dread their annual physical.

If that's not you, no worries. But if it is, and you're just being polite, let's cut the bullshit and talk about what's really going on.

What's the real issue?

---

#### STEP 12: Assess Readiness (Short Problem Duration)

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact has been struggling less than 3 years

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF shows serious commitment: → Go to Step 5
> - IF seems casual about problem: → Go to Step 18 (Not Ready)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: short-duration-problem]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Interesting. Most executives I work with have been stuck in this cycle for 3-5 years.

Since you're relatively new to this struggle, I want to make sure you're serious about solving it.

Are you looking for a proven system that requires real commitment, or are you still in the "I'll figure this out myself" phase?

Because if it's the latter, save yourself $12,000 and try a few more generic programs first.

---

#### STEP 13: Address Investment Concerns

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact hesitant about investment level

**Time Delay:** Wait 1 minute

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF shows renewed interest: → Go to Step 6
> - IF still concerned about price: → Go to Step 19 (ROI Discussion)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: price-sensitive]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I get it. $12,000 feels like a lot.

But let me ask you this - what's the cost of staying where you are?

Rick P. was prediabetic with an A1C of 6.2. His doctor said he was heading for medication and complications.

After 6 months with our system, his A1C dropped to 5.4. His doctor couldn't believe the numbers.

The health cost savings alone justified the investment. Not counting his improved business performance.

What's your health worth to you?

---

#### STEP 14: Handle Questions

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact has questions about the program

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF questions answered satisfactorily: → Go to Step 6
> - IF needs more information: → Go to Step 20 (Detailed Info)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: has-questions]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

What specific questions do you have?

I'll give you straight answers. No sales bullshit.

The program works. I've got 11 years and 340 clients proving it.

But it's not for everyone. It's for executives who understand that expert guidance accelerates results and prevents costly mistakes.

What do you want to know?

---

#### STEP 15: Schedule Call

**Trigger Condition:**
> Application approved after review

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 hours (for manual review)

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF call scheduled: → Go to Step 21 (Pre-call)
> - IF no response after 48 hours: → Go to Step 22 (Call Reminder)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: call-approved]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Call Scheduled]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Application approved.

Based on your responses, you're exactly the type of executive The Performance Stack was designed for.

Here's my calendar to schedule a 30-minute strategy call: [COACH: Insert your calendar link here]

We'll discuss your specific situation, travel schedule, and how the system would work for you.

Come prepared to talk about your real constraints and goals. This isn't a sales pitch - it's a strategy session.

---

#### STEP 16: Complete Application

**Trigger Condition:**
> Application submitted but incomplete

**Time Delay:** Wait 30 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF application completed: → Go to Step 7
> - IF still incomplete after 24 hours: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: incomplete-application]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Your application is missing some key information.

I need complete details about your schedule, travel patterns, and health goals to determine if we're a good fit.

Please complete the application here: [COACH: Insert your application URL here]

I can't properly assess your situation without the full picture.

---

#### STEP 17: Final Follow-up

**Trigger Condition:**
> No response after 48 hours of follow-up attempts

**Time Delay:** Wait 48 hours

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact responds: → Return to appropriate step
> - IF no response: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: final-follow-up]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Cold]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Last message.

You showed interest in getting in the best shape of your life without gym dependency.

Either you're serious about solving this problem or you're not.

If you are, the application is here: [COACH: Insert your application URL here]

If not, good luck with the Peloton.

---

#### STEP 18: Not Ready

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact seems casual about fitness problem

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: not-ready]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Not Ready]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Got it. Sounds like you're still in the "I'll figure this out myself" phase.

No judgment. Most executives go through that.

When you're tired of the trial-and-error approach and ready for a proven system, you know where to find me.

---

#### STEP 19: ROI Discussion

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact still concerned about price after initial objection handling

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF shows renewed interest: → Go to Step 6
> - IF still price-focused: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: price-focused]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Look, I'm not going to convince you to invest in your health.

Either you see the value or you don't.

You probably spend more on your car than most people spend on their health.

You invest in business consultants, software, and tools because you know expert guidance accelerates results.

Your health is your most valuable business asset.

If you don't see that, we're not a good fit.

---

#### STEP 20: Detailed Info

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact needs more program information

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF satisfied with info: → Go to Step 6
> - IF needs call to discuss: → Go to Step 23 (Info Call)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: needs-details]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Here's exactly what you get:

• Custom training program for your home office
• Nutrition protocol that works with business travel  
• Weekly video reviews of your progress
• Biweekly 1-on-1 calls for real-time adjustments
• Private Slack access for immediate questions
• Hotel and travel workout protocols
• Quarterly bloodwork review

6 months. $12,000. Guarantee: lose 20 lbs in first 90 days or I work with you free until you do.

Still have questions?

---

#### STEP 21: Pre-call Preparation

**Trigger Condition:**
> Call scheduled successfully

**Time Delay:** Wait 24 hours before call

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Call completed: → Manual follow-up
> - Call missed: → Go to Step 24 (Reschedule)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: call-scheduled]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Call confirmed for [DATE/TIME].

Come prepared to discuss:
• Your current schedule and travel patterns
• Biggest health/energy challenges
• What you've tried before and why it failed
• Your goals for the next 6 months

This isn't a sales call. It's a strategy session to see if The Performance Stack fits your situation.

See you then.

---

#### STEP 22: Call Reminder

**Trigger Condition:**
> No response after call scheduling

**Time Delay:** Wait 48 hours

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF call scheduled: → Go to Step 21
> - IF no response: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: call-reminder-sent]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Haven't seen you schedule that strategy call yet.

If you're having second thoughts, I get it. This is a significant investment.

But if you're serious about getting in the best shape of your life, the calendar link is here: [COACH: Insert your calendar link here]

Otherwise, good luck with whatever approach you choose.

---

#### STEP 23: Info Call Option

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact needs call to discuss details

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF wants call: → Go to Step 15
> - IF doesn't want call: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: info-call-requested]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

If you need a call to discuss the details, we can do that.

But understand - I'm selective about who I work with. This call isn't to convince you.

It's to determine if you're the type of executive who gets results with this system.

Ready to schedule?

---

#### STEP 24: Reschedule Call

**Trigger Condition:**
> Scheduled call was missed

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 hours after missed call

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF rescheduled: → Go to Step 21
> - IF no response after 24 hours: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: missed-call]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Missed our call today.

I get it - executive schedules are unpredictable.

If you want to reschedule, here's the calendar: [COACH: Insert your calendar link here]

If not, no worries. The application will be here when you're ready to prioritize your health.

---

## SEQUENCE TAGS SUMMARY

**Lead Source:** instagram-lead
**Qualification:** income-qualified, problem-aware, chronic-problem, investment-ready
**Engagement:** application-ready, application-submitted, call-scheduled
**Disqualification:** income-disqualified, not-ready, price-focused
**Follow-up:** follow-up-needed, final-follow-up, call-reminder-sent

## PIPELINE STAGES

1. New Lead
2. Qualifying  
3. Interested
4. Qualified
5. Hot Lead
6. Application
7. Application Review
8. Call Scheduled
9. Disqualified
10. Not Ready
11. Cold

fitness-sparse.content:
# ManyChat Automation Flow: Reed Performance

## FLOW 1: DM KEYWORD TRIGGER + WELCOME/QUALIFICATION

---
#### NODE: Keyword Response
- **Trigger:** DM keyword "ATHLETE" or comment "ATHLETE" on posts
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** [+Add DM-Lead]
- **Custom Fields:** lead_source = dm-keyword

**Message:**
> Hey! Saw you're interested in The Executive Athlete Program.
> 
> Before I share the details, I want to make sure it's actually the right fit for you.
> 
> Quick question - what's your current situation?

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Run my own company | Quick Reply | Qualification Q2 |
| Employee/Executive | Quick Reply | Qualification Q2 |
| Just starting out | Quick Reply | Disqualification |

**Next Step:** Routes to Q2 based on button selection
---

#### NODE: Qualification Q2
- **Trigger:** Button tap from previous node
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> Got it. What's your biggest challenge right now with staying in shape?

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| No time to train | Quick Reply | Qualification Q3 |
| Travel constantly | Quick Reply | Qualification Q3 |
| Tried everything | Quick Reply | Qualification Q3 |
| Low energy/tired | Quick Reply | Qualification Q3 |

**Next Step:** All buttons route to Q3, stores answer in custom field
---

#### NODE: Qualification Q3
- **Trigger:** Button tap from Q2
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** biggest_challenge = [button selection]

**Message:**
> That's exactly what we solve. One more question:
> 
> If this turns out to be the right fit, are you in a position to invest in your health right now?

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Yes, ready to invest | Quick Reply | Investment Qualifier |
| Need to know more | Quick Reply | Investment Qualifier |
| Not right now | Quick Reply | Nurture Router |

**Next Step:** Routes based on readiness level
---

#### NODE: Investment Qualifier
- **Trigger:** "Yes" or "Need to know more" from Q3
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** readiness_level = [button selection]

**Message:**
> Perfect. The program is $12,000 for 6 months of 1-on-1 coaching.
> 
> Does that investment range work for you?

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Yes, that works | Quick Reply | Qualified Router |
| Need to think about it | Quick Reply | Nurture Router |
| Too much right now | Quick Reply | Disqualification |

**Next Step:** Final routing based on budget qualification
---

#### NODE: Qualified Router
- **Trigger:** "Yes, that works" from Investment Qualifier
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** [+Add Qualified]
- **Custom Fields:** qualification_status = qualified

**Message:**
> Excellent. You're exactly who this program is designed for.
> 
> Here's what you get:

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Tell me more | Quick Reply | Offer Delivery |

**Next Step:** Routes to FLOW 2 (Offer Delivery)
---

## FLOW 2: OFFER DELIVERY + SALES CONVERSION

---
#### NODE: Offer Delivery
- **Trigger:** Button tap from Qualified Router
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** [+Add Offer-Sent]
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> The Executive Athlete Program:
> 
> ✓ Custom training that fits your home office
> ✓ Nutrition protocols for business travel
> ✓ Weekly video check-ins + biweekly 1-on-1 calls
> ✓ Private Slack access for immediate support
> ✓ Hotel/travel workout systems
> 
> Goal: Lose 30 lbs in 6 months without missing business meetings
> 
> Ready to apply?

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Apply now | URL | [Application Link] |
| I have questions | Quick Reply | Q&A Handler |

**Next Step:** Application link or Q&A, 1-hour delay to Social Proof if no action
---

#### NODE: Q&A Handler
- **Trigger:** "I have questions" button
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> What's your main question? I'll answer it straight up.

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| How does online work? | Quick Reply | Online Objection |
| Will this fit my schedule? | Quick Reply | Time Objection |
| What if I travel a lot? | Quick Reply | Travel Objection |
| Other question | Quick Reply | General Response |

**Next Step:** Routes to specific objection handlers
---

#### NODE: Online Objection
- **Trigger:** "How does online work?" button
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> Dan M. travels 2 weeks per month and gets better results than he ever got with local trainers.
> 
> Why? We're not just watching your form - we're building a complete system that works whether you're in your home office or a hotel in Tokyo.
> 
> The protocols adapt to your reality.

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| That makes sense | Quick Reply | Back to Application |
| Tell me more | Quick Reply | Social Proof |

**Next Step:** Routes back to application or continues education
---

#### NODE: Time Objection
- **Trigger:** "Will this fit my schedule?" button
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> The system is designed FOR your schedule, not against it.
> 
> 15-minute workouts between meetings. Nutrition that works during business dinners. Recovery protocols for jet lag.
> 
> You're not adding time commitments - you're optimizing the time you have.

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Ready to apply | URL | [Application Link] |
| Still not sure | Quick Reply | Social Proof |

**Next Step:** Application or continues to social proof
---

#### NODE: Social Proof
- **Trigger:** 1 hour delay from Offer Delivery if no button tap, or from objection handlers
- **Delay:** 1 hour (or instant from objection)
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> Rick P. was a private equity partner with prediabetic A1C of 6.2.
> 
> 6 months later: A1C dropped to 5.4, lost 28 lbs.
> 
> His doctor couldn't believe the numbers.
> 
> Same system. Same results available to you.

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Apply now | URL | [Application Link] |
| Not ready yet | Quick Reply | Nurture Router |

**Next Step:** Application or nurture sequence
---

#### NODE: Urgency Reminder
- **Trigger:** 24 hours from Offer Delivery if no application
- **Delay:** 24 hours
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> I only work with 12 clients at a time because everyone gets direct access to me.
> 
> Right now you're catching your reflection in the elevator mirror and cringing.
> 
> The best time to fix this is when you're feeling that pull to change.

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Apply now | URL | [Application Link] |
| Not ready | Quick Reply | Nurture Router |

**Next Step:** Final application attempt or nurture
---

#### NODE: Final Conversion
- **Trigger:** 48 hours from Offer Delivery if still no action
- **Delay:** 48 hours
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> Picture this: Walking into your next board meeting with the confidence of someone who just deadlifted twice their bodyweight.
> 
> Energy that stays strong through 12-hour days. Your kids asking you to throw the football and you don't make excuses.
> 
> That's The Executive Athlete.
> 
> If this resonates, here's the link. If not, no worries at all.

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| I'm ready | URL | [Application Link] |

**Next Step:** Final CTA - no chase after this per John's rule
---

## FLOW 3: NURTURE SEQUENCE

---
#### NODE: Nurture Day 1
- **Trigger:** "Not ready" buttons from sales flow
- **Delay:** Immediate
- **Tags:** [+Add Nurture-Active] [-Remove Offer-Sent]
- **Custom Fields:** qualification_status = nurture

**Message:**
> No problem. Here's something that'll help right now:
> 
> Stop trying to find 60-90 minutes for the gym. Start with 15 minutes in your office between meetings.
> 
> Most executives think they need more time. Wrong. You need better systems.

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| This is helpful | Quick Reply | Engagement Tracker |

**Next Step:** 24-hour delay to Day 2
---

#### NODE: Day 2 Belief Shift
- **Trigger:** 24 hours from Day 1
- **Delay:** 24 hours
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> Most executives believe they just need more willpower to stick to fitness programs.
> 
> Truth: You don't lack discipline. You lack a system designed for someone with your constraints.
> 
> You prove daily you have incredible discipline in business. Apply that same systematic thinking to your health.

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| That makes sense | Quick Reply | Day 3 |
| Tell me more | Quick Reply | Day 3 |

**Next Step:** Routes to Day 3
---

#### NODE: Day 3 Story
- **Trigger:** 24 hours from Day 2
- **Delay:** 24 hours
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> In 2021 I was training 12 hours a day at my gym, barely breaking even, gaining weight myself.
> 
> I thought I needed to work harder. Wrong.
> 
> A client asked to train over Zoom. That's when I realized - the right system makes constraints irrelevant.
> 
> Now I help executives get in the best shape of their lives from their home office.

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| I want results like that | Quick Reply | Back to Offer |

**Next Step:** Option to re-enter sales flow or continue nurture
---

#### NODE: Day 4 Belief Shift 2
- **Trigger:** 24 hours from Day 3
- **Delay:** 24 hours
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> Something most executives get wrong:
> 
> They think their health is separate from their business success.
> 
> Your health IS your most valuable business asset. Everything else depends on it.
> 
> Warren Buffett: "Take care of your body and mind because you only get one."

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Never thought of it that way | Quick Reply | Day 5 |
| How do I fix this? | Quick Reply | Day 5 |

**Next Step:** Routes to Day 5
---

#### NODE: Day 5 Free Resource
- **Trigger:** 24 hours from Day 4
- **Delay:** 24 hours
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> I put together The Executive's 15-Minute Workout for people in your exact situation.
> 
> It's designed to fit between meetings and requires zero equipment.
> 
> [COACH: Insert your lead magnet link here]

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Thanks! | Quick Reply | Day 6 |
| Tell me about your program | Quick Reply | Back to Offer |

**Next Step:** Continue nurture or re-enter sales flow
---

#### NODE: Day 6 Soft Pitch
- **Trigger:** 24 hours from Day 5
- **Delay:** 24 hours
- **Tags:** None
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> Here's what most executives don't realize:
> 
> Generic programs assume you have unlimited time and energy. Your reality includes board meetings, business travel, 60-hour weeks.
> 
> The Executive Athlete Program is built for exactly that reality. If you ever want to go deeper on this, that's what it's designed for.

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Tell me more | Quick Reply | Back to Offer |
| Just browsing | Quick Reply | Day 7 |

**Next Step:** Sales flow or final nurture message
---

#### NODE: Day 7 Final Vision
- **Trigger:** 24 hours from Day 6
- **Delay:** 24 hours
- **Tags:** [+Add Nurture-Complete] [-Remove Nurture-Active]
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> Picture walking into any room knowing you look and feel strong.
> 
> Sustained energy through 12-hour days. Being present for your kids because you're not exhausted.
> 
> Taking your shirt off at the beach without sucking in.
> 
> That's The Executive Athlete. Whenever you're ready, I'm here. No rush.

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| I'm ready now | URL | [Application Link] |

**Next Step:** Final soft CTA - no more messages per "I don't chase" rule
---

## DISQUALIFICATION & UTILITY NODES

---
#### NODE: Disqualification
- **Trigger:** Wrong answers from qualification or budget
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** [+Add Not-Qualified-Yet]
- **Custom Fields:** qualification_status = disqualified

**Message:**
> Thanks for your interest! The Executive Athlete Program is specifically designed for established business owners making $300K+.
> 
> When you're at that stage, reach out again - I'd love to help.
> 
> Here's a free resource in the meantime: [COACH: Insert lead magnet link]

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Thanks | Quick Reply | End Flow |

**Next Step:** End of flow
---

#### NODE: Engagement Tracker
- **Trigger:** Various "helpful" or engagement buttons
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** [+Add Engaged]
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> Glad that helped! More coming tomorrow.

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| 👍 | Quick Reply | Continue Flow |

**Next Step:** Returns to scheduled flow
---

#### NODE: Back to Offer
- **Trigger:** Re-engagement buttons from nurture
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** [+Add Re-Engaged] [-Remove Nurture-Active]
- **Custom Fields:** None

**Message:**
> Perfect timing. Here's what The Executive Athlete Program includes:
> 
> ✓ Custom protocols for your home office
> ✓ Travel nutrition systems
> ✓ Weekly video check-ins
> ✓ Direct access to me via Slack
> 
> $12,000 for 6 months. Ready to apply?

**Buttons:**
| Button Label | Action | Connects To |
|---|---|---|
| Apply now | URL | [Application Link] |
| Questions first | Quick Reply | Q&A Handler |

**Next Step:** Application or Q&A flow
---

## MANYCHAT SETUP CONFIGURATION

### Tags to Create:
- `DM-Lead` — applied on keyword trigger
- `Qualified` — passed all qualification questions  
- `Not-Qualified-Yet` — didn't meet criteria
- `Offer-Sent` — received offer details
- `Applied` — clicked application link
- `Nurture-Active` — currently in nurture sequence
- `Nurture-Complete` — finished nurture sequence
- `Engaged` — tapped engagement buttons
- `Re-Engaged` — came back from nurture to sales flow

### Custom Fields to Create:
- `qualification_status` (text) — "qualified" / "nurture" / "disqualified"
- `biggest_challenge` (text) — their Q2 answer
- `readiness_level` (text) — their Q3 answer  
- `lead_source` (text) — "dm-keyword"

### Growth Tools Setup:
1. **Instagram Comment Growth Tool:** Keyword "ATHLETE" triggers flow
2. **Instagram Story Mention:** Auto-respond with flow entry
3. **Instagram DM Keywords:** "ATHLETE", "EXECUTIVE", "FITNESS"

### Automation Rules:
- If subscriber gets tag "Applied" → pause all sequences
- If subscriber has tag "Nurture-Complete" + no engagement for 30 days → move to re-engagement campaign
- If subscriber taps application link → tag "Applied" + send to CRM

### Application Link Setup:
Replace `[Application Link]` with your actual Calendly, Typeform, or application page URL throughout the flow.

fitness-sparse.content:
# Facebook Content Playbook: Reed Performance
*20 Posts for Systematic Belief-Shifting*

---

## POST 1: VALUE POST
**Type:** Value | **Funnel Stage:** TOF | **Retargeting:** Y - Business owners interested in fitness

Most executives think they need 60-90 minutes to get a decent workout.

That's the biggest lie in executive fitness.

Here's what actually works:

15-20 minute high-intensity sessions beat hour-long moderate workouts every time. Why? Intensity trumps duration when you're short on time.

Try this today: Pick 5 compound exercises. Do 3 rounds. 45 seconds work, 15 seconds rest. Done in 15 minutes.

You'll build more strength than most people get in an hour at the gym.

You don't have a time problem — you have a system problem that makes everything take longer than it should.

**PRIMARY TEXT (LONG):**
You don't have a time problem — you have a system problem that makes everything take longer than it should.

Compare your business systems vs your fitness systems. You wouldn't run your company without CRM, processes, and accountability structures. Your fitness needs the same systematic approach.

You already know this in business — you don't rely on motivation to hit quarterly targets, you build systems and processes. You track KPIs, have accountability structures, and adjust based on data. You know willpower fails but systems scale.

fitness-sparse.content:
# YouTube Video Script: Reed Performance

**VIDEO TITLE:** "Why 90% of Executives Fail at Fitness (And the 10% Who Don't)"

**THUMBNAIL TEXT:** "EXECUTIVE FITNESS FAILURE"

**DESCRIPTION:** Male executives making $300K+ struggle with fitness because they're using systems designed for people with unlimited time. In this video, I break down why willpower-based approaches fail and reveal The Performance Stack — the only system that syncs training, nutrition, and recovery to a 60-hour work week. If you're tired of buying equipment you never use and hiring trainers you cancel on, this changes everything.

**CORE BELIEF SHIFT:** From "Generic fitness programs and willpower are the path to getting in shape" → "The Performance Stack — a 3-layer system that syncs training, nutrition, and recovery to the rhythm of a 60-hour work week — is the proven path to executive fitness"

---

## 1. HOOK (0:00-0:30)

How to lose 30 pounds in 6 months without missing a single business meeting.

If you're a male executive making $300K+ who's sick and tired of buying Peloton bikes that collect dust and hiring trainers you cancel on repeatedly, this video is for you.

Because I'm going to show you why 90% of executives fail at fitness and what the 10% who succeed do differently.

And it's not what you think.

Most executives believe they need more willpower or more time. Wrong. You need a system that works with your 60-hour weeks, not against them.

[ON SCREEN: "90% of executives fail at fitness"]

By the end of this video, you'll understand why every fitness program you've tried has failed and exactly what to do instead.

---

## 2. INTRO (0:30-1:30)

My name is Marcus Reed. I help busy executives get in the best shape of their lives without leaving their home office.

Over 11 years, I've coached 340 clients, and I've seen the same pattern over and over: successful executives who dominate in business but can't crack the code on their health.

Here's what you're going to learn in the next 15 minutes:

First, the real reason executives fail at fitness — and it's not lack of discipline.

Second, why the fitness industry's approach is fundamentally broken for people like you.

And third, the exact system my clients use to lose 30+ pounds while traveling 2 weeks per month and never missing important meetings.

This video is for male executives age 40-55 who run their own companies and haven't prioritized their health in years.

If you're looking for a magic pill or quick fix, this isn't for you.

But if you're ready to treat your body with the same strategic approach you use to grow your business, keep watching.

[ON SCREEN: "Subscribe for executive fitness strategies"]

---

## 3. PROBLEM (1:30-4:00)

Here's what I see every day: executives who can build million-dollar companies but can't stick to a workout plan for 30 days.

You probably think your problem is lack of willpower and discipline.

You tell yourself, "If I can run a company, I should be able to follow a fitness plan."

So you buy the Peloton. Download MyFitnessPal. Hire a local trainer.

And what happens? You use the Peloton twice. Abandon the app after two weeks. Cancel on the trainer because you have a board meeting.

Then you blame yourself for lacking discipline.

[ON SCREEN: "The willpower trap"]

But here's the truth: you don't have a discipline problem. You have a system problem.

Every morning, you catch your reflection in the elevator mirror and feel embarrassed. By 3pm, you're exhausted and running on caffeine. You're dreading your next physical because you know the numbers are heading in the wrong direction.

Meanwhile, your younger VP is out-lifting you at the company retreat, and you're thinking about your dad who died at 58.

The cost of staying stuck isn't just physical. It's mental, financial, and relational.

You're missing your kids' baseball games because you're too tired. You're avoiding family photos. You're modeling failure for your team.

And every month you delay, your body gets another month older while your habits stay exactly the same.

[ON SCREEN: "Every month of delay compounds"]

---

## 4. NEW BELIEF / PARADIGM SHIFT (4:00-8:00)

Here's what the fitness industry doesn't want you to know: executive transformation requires executive-level systems, not consumer-level programs.

You wouldn't try to run your enterprise business with consumer-grade software, right?

**[PROOF BLOCK: Universal Analogy]**
It's like trying to run enterprise software on consumer hardware. The effort is there, but the foundation can't support the goal. Generic fitness programs are consumer-grade solutions for enterprise-level challenges.

**[PROOF BLOCK: Authority Reference]**
Jim Collins shows in "Good to Great" that great companies don't rely on heroic individual effort — they build systems that produce consistent results regardless of circumstances. The same principle applies to executive fitness.

**[PROOF BLOCK: Personal Story]**
I learned this the hard way. In 2021, I was training 12 hours a day at my gym and still barely breaking even. I was burnt out, gaining weight, and resenting clients. I thought I needed to work harder.

Then COVID hit. A client asked if I could train him over Zoom. I said yes, and realized I could help just as many people without a physical location.

That's when it clicked: I wasn't lazy or undisciplined. I was fighting the wrong battle. I was trying to force a broken system instead of building a system that worked with reality.

**[PROOF BLOCK: Cross-Domain Reference]**
You already know this in business. You don't blame your sales team for "lacking discipline" if your CRM system is broken and your sales process is poorly designed. You fix the system.

**[PROOF BLOCK: Logic Trap]**
If willpower was the answer, then every successful executive would automatically be in great shape. But that's not what we see, is it? The most disciplined people in business often struggle the most with fitness. Why? Because they're using the wrong system.

**[PROOF BLOCK: Client Story]**
Dan M. is a SaaS CEO who was 42 pounds over target and hadn't trained in 3 years. He tried three different trainers who all gave him the same advice: "Just show up to the gym five times a week."

But Dan travels 2 weeks per month. He has board meetings that run late. His schedule changes daily.

The trainers were solving for someone with a 9-to-5 job, not someone running a company.

**[PROOF BLOCK: Statistics/Data]**
Here's the data: out of 340 clients I've worked with over 11 years, those who used systematic protocols had an 85% higher completion rate than those who relied on willpower-based approaches.

The difference wasn't effort. It was having systems designed for their actual constraints.

**[PROOF BLOCK: Reframe]**
What if the problem isn't that you lack discipline? What if the problem is that you're trying to use a hammer to fix a computer problem?

You need The Performance Stack — a 3-layer system that syncs training, nutrition, and recovery to the rhythm of a 60-hour work week.

[ON SCREEN: "Systems beat willpower every time"]

---

## 5. PROOF / STORIES (8:00-12:00)

Let me tell you exactly how I discovered this.

**Personal Story:**
I spent years believing that business success required health sacrifice. I was training clients 12 hours a day, barely breaking even, and my own health was declining.

I thought the solution was working harder. Longer hours. More hustle.

But when that client asked to train over Zoom, everything changed. I realized I could help just as many people — maybe more — without the physical constraints.

I closed the gym in 2022 and went fully online. Now I coach executives remotely with customized programs that work anywhere.

The lesson: the constraint I was fighting was actually the breakthrough. Sometimes the limitation forces the innovation.

**Client Story:**
Rick P. is a private equity partner with a prediabetic A1C of 6.2. He was heading toward medication and serious health complications.

He'd tried four different approaches: personal trainers, gym memberships, diet programs, even hired a nutritionist.

Nothing stuck because none of them accounted for his reality: client dinners three nights a week, international travel, 14-hour days during deal season.

We built The Performance Stack around his actual life. Custom protocols for business dinners. Travel workouts for hotel rooms. Recovery strategies for high-stress periods.

Result: A1C dropped to 5.4, lost 28 pounds in 6 months. His doctor couldn't believe the numbers.

As Rick said, "This is the first program that worked with my life instead of against it."

**External Example:**
Warren Buffett has a principle: take care of your body and mind because you only get one. You can't buy a replacement body like you can buy a replacement car.

But most executives treat their health like a side project while treating their business like their life's work.

The top 1% of performers understand that health IS business infrastructure. Your body is the platform that everything else runs on.

[ON SCREEN: "Health is business infrastructure"]

---

## 6. ACTION STEPS (12:00-15:00)

Here's what you can do today to start applying The Performance Stack:

**Step 1: Audit Your Current Approach**
Look at your last three fitness attempts. Write down why each one failed. I guarantee it wasn't lack of willpower — it was lack of integration with your actual schedule.

**Step 2: Map Your Real Constraints**
List your actual obstacles: travel days per month, average meeting hours per day, business dinner frequency. Stop pretending you have a simple schedule.

**Step 3: Design for Reality, Not Fantasy**
Choose one 15-minute time slot that exists in your calendar every day, regardless of meetings. This becomes your non-negotiable training window.

**Step 4: Start with Bodyweight Protocols**
You don't need a gym. Five exercises: push-ups, squats, planks, lunges, and mountain climbers. Three rounds. Done in your office between meetings.

**Step 5: Track Leading Indicators**
Don't just track weight. Track energy levels at 3pm, sleep quality, and workout consistency. These predict transformation before the scale moves.

The goal isn't perfection. It's building a system that works when life gets chaotic — which for executives is always.

[ON SCREEN: "Systems work when life gets chaotic"]

---

## 7. CTA (15:00-End)

So remember — it's not about having more willpower or more time. It's about having systems that sync with your reality.

Stop trying to force your schedule around workouts. Start syncing workouts to your schedule.

Imagine walking into that board meeting with the confidence of someone who just deadlifted twice their body weight in their home office.

Imagine having energy that stays strong through 12-hour days because your body is finally working with you, not against you.

Imagine being proud of how you look and feel instead of avoiding mirrors and photos.

That's what happens when you become The Executive Athlete — a high performer who takes his body as seriously as his P&L.

If you want the complete system, I've created a free guide called "The Executive's 15-Minute Workout" — it's the exact protocol my clients use to build strength between meetings.

Link is in the description.

For those ready to go deeper, The Executive Athlete Program is my 6-month system for executives who want the complete transformation. We work together to build your custom Performance Stack.

But start with the free guide first.

Subscribe if you want more strategies for executive fitness. I post weekly.

And drop a comment below — what's your biggest takeaway from this video?

Thanks for watching. Now go implement that 15-minute protocol today.

[ON SCREEN: "Get The Executive's 15-Minute Workout - Link Below"]

---

**ESTIMATED WORD COUNT: 1,847 words (12-15 minutes at 150 words/minute)**

**KEY OBJECTIONS HANDLED:**
- "I don't have time" → Systems sync with your schedule
- "Online coaching can't work" → Proven results with remote protocols  
- "I've tried before" → Previous attempts used wrong systems

**ENGAGEMENT HOOKS:**
- Pattern interrupt about willpower myth
- Specific executive pain points
- Data from 340 clients
- Clear action steps
- Free resource offer

# Short-Form Video Scripts: Reed Performance

---

## Short #1 — Hook Clip
**Type:** Pattern Interrupt
**Platform:** All platforms
**Duration:** 45 seconds

### Hook (On-Screen Text)
"90% of executives fail at fitness"

### Script
Stop blaming yourself for lacking discipline. You don't have a willpower problem — you have a system problem.

Every executive I've worked with in 11 years thinks they need more discipline to get in shape. Wrong.

You wouldn't run your enterprise business with consumer-grade software, right? So why are you trying to use consumer fitness programs for your executive lifestyle?

Generic gym routines and meal plans are built for people with 9-to-5 schedules. You travel 2 weeks per month. You have board meetings that run late. Your schedule changes daily.

The solution isn't working harder. It's working smarter.

The Performance Stack syncs training, nutrition, and recovery to your 60-hour work week instead of fighting against it.

### On-Screen Text Overlay
- "90% of executives fail at fitness"
- "You don't have a willpower problem"
- "You have a system problem"
- "Enterprise problems need enterprise solutions"

### Visual Direction
Talking head with quick cuts between key points. Show contrast visuals: generic gym vs. home office setup.

### CTA
"Follow for executive fitness systems that actually work."

### Hashtags
#ExecutiveFitness #BusinessOwnerHealth #SystemsOverWillpower #PerformanceStack #ExecutiveAthlete

---

## Short #2 — Belief Shift Clip
**Type:** Reframe
**Platform:** All platforms  
**Duration:** 50 seconds

### Hook (On-Screen Text)
"Your Peloton is collecting dust for a reason"

### Script
You bought the Peloton. Downloaded MyFitnessPal. Hired a trainer you canceled on three times.

Then you blamed yourself for lacking discipline.

Here's what actually happened: you tried to force your schedule around workouts instead of syncing workouts to your schedule.

It's like trying to run enterprise software on consumer hardware. The effort is there, but the foundation can't support the goal.

I've coached 340 executives over 11 years. The ones who succeed don't have more willpower. They have systems designed for their actual constraints.

Stop trying to be The Peloton Paperweight CEO who buys equipment he never uses.

Start becoming The Executive Athlete who takes his body as seriously as his P&L.

### On-Screen Text Overlay
- "Your Peloton is collecting dust for a reason"
- "You tried to force your schedule around workouts"
- "Systems designed for your constraints"
- "The Executive Athlete"

### Visual Direction
Show unused exercise equipment, then transition to clean home office setup with simple bodyweight exercises.

### CTA
"Ready to build your Performance Stack? Link in bio."

### Hashtags
#ExecutiveAthlete #PerformanceStack #SystemsThinking #ExecutiveFitness #HomeOfficeFitness

---

## Short #3 — Story Clip
**Type:** Personal Transformation
**Platform:** All platforms
**Duration:** 55 seconds

### Hook (On-Screen Text)
"I was training 12 hours a day and gaining weight"

### Script
In 2021, I was training clients 12 hours a day at my gym and still barely breaking even. I was burnt out, gaining weight, and resenting the people I was supposed to help.

I thought the solution was working harder. Longer hours. More hustle.

Then COVID hit. A client asked if I could train him over Zoom. I said yes, just to keep him as a client.

That one session changed everything. I realized I could help just as many people without the physical constraints of a gym.

I closed Reed Performance gym in 2022 and went fully online. Now I coach executives remotely with programs that work anywhere.

The constraint I was fighting was actually the breakthrough. Sometimes the limitation forces the innovation.

### On-Screen Text Overlay
- "Training 12 hours a day, gaining weight"
- "COVID forced innovation"
- "Closed my gym in 2022"
- "Constraints force breakthroughs"

### Visual Direction
Split screen showing gym chaos vs. clean home office coaching setup.

### CTA
"Follow for more executive fitness strategies."

### Hashtags
#EntrepreneurStory #BusinessPivot #ExecutiveFitness #OnlineCoaching #SystemsOverHustle

---

## Short #4 — Hook Clip
**Type:** Contrarian Take
**Platform:** All platforms
**Duration:** 40 seconds

### Hook (On-Screen Text)
"You're too successful to get in shape"

### Script
Here's why successful executives struggle with fitness: you're too good at your job.

You can build million-dollar companies but can't stick to a workout plan for 30 days. Why?

Because you're used to complex, strategic thinking. But every trainer gives you the same simple advice: "Just show up to the gym five times a week."

That's not strategy. That's hope.

You need The Performance Stack — a system that treats your body like the business asset it is.

Stop using consumer-grade fitness programs for enterprise-level challenges.

### On-Screen Text Overlay
- "You're too successful to get in shape"
- "You're used to strategic thinking"
- "Stop using consumer-grade programs"
- "The Performance Stack"

### Visual Direction
Quick cuts between boardroom scenes and home office workout setup.

### CTA
"Want the system? Link in bio for The Executive's 15-Minute Workout."

### Hashtags

## Short #5 — Belief Shift Clip
**Type:** Logic Trap
**Platform:** All platforms
**Duration:** 45 seconds

### Hook (On-Screen Text)
"If willpower worked, every CEO would be jacked"

### Script
If willpower was the answer to fitness, then every successful executive would automatically be in great shape.

But that's not what we see, is it?

The most disciplined people in business often struggle the most with fitness. Why?

Because they're using the wrong system.

You don't blame your sales team for lacking discipline if your CRM is broken and your sales process is poorly designed. You fix the system.

Same principle applies to your health.

Out of 340 clients I've worked with, those who used systematic protocols had 85% higher completion rates than those who relied on willpower.

The difference wasn't effort. It was having systems designed for their actual constraints.

### Script
Imagine walking into that board meeting with the confidence of someone who just deadlifted twice their body weight in their home office.

Imagine having energy that stays strong through 12-hour days because your body is finally working with you, not against you.

That's what happens when you become The Executive Athlete.

I've created a free guide called "The Executive's 15-Minute Workout" — the exact protocol my clients use to build strength between meetings.

This is only for male executives making $300K+ who are serious about treating their health like a business asset.

## Short #7 — Story Clip
**Type:** Client Transformation
**Platform:** All platforms
**Duration:** 50 seconds

### Hook (On-Screen Text)
"SaaS CEO lost 42 lbs while traveling 2 weeks per month"

### Script
Dan M. is a SaaS CEO who was 42 pounds over target and hadn't trained in 3 years.

He tried three different trainers who all gave him the same advice: "Just show up to the gym five times a week."

But Dan travels 2 weeks per month. He has board meetings that run late. His schedule changes daily.

The trainers were solving for someone with a 9-to-5 job, not someone running a company.

We built The Performance Stack around his actual life. Custom protocols for business dinners. Travel workouts for hotel rooms. Recovery strategies for high-stress periods.

Result: Lost 42 pounds, now squats twice his bodyweight, travels constantly and stays on track.

As Dan said, "Marcus is the only trainer who actually gets what my life is like."

business-abstract.content:
# MISSION STATEMENT FOR SARAH CHEN

**WE WILL BUILD A SIGNATURE GROUP PROGRAM WITH 100 MEMBERS BY [COACH: Insert your deadline here] BECAUSE THE HUSTLE PLAYBOOK IS KILLING A GENERATION OF FEMALE FOUNDERS AND NO ONE IS TELLING THEM THE TRUTH ABOUT WHY. THEY WILL NO LONGER BE RESENTFUL, EXHAUSTED, INVISIBLE, AND LONELY AT THE TOP, AND WILL INSTEAD BECOME SPACIOUS, GROUNDED, SELF-TRUSTING, AND PROUD SOVEREIGN CEOS WHO LEAD FROM FULLNESS.**

---

## THE BREAKDOWN

**THE GOAL** — We're building a signature group program with 100 members. Not just any program — one that transforms six-figure female founders who are trapped by their own success. This isn't about scale for scale's sake. It's about reaching the women who are silently drowning in their "successful" businesses.

**THE DEADLINE** — [COACH: Insert your specific deadline here]. Urgency matters because every day we delay, another female founder is working herself into the ground, believing that exhaustion equals excellence. Time is not neutral when women are burning out.

**THE REASON** — The hustle playbook is literally killing a generation of female founders, and the business world keeps selling them more of the same poison. We're the antidote. We're here to tell the uncomfortable truth: your income ceiling isn't about strategy — it's about the inner narratives that keep you stuck in patterns you can't see.

**THE TRANSFORMATION** — Every woman who works with us stops being a resentful high-achiever who can't stop and becomes a sovereign CEO who leads from fullness. She goes from exhausted and invisible to spacious and self-trusting. From working 70-hour weeks to running her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment.

---

## DAILY REMINDER VERSION

**I'm building this because female founders deserve to run profitable businesses without sacrificing their souls. Every woman I help becomes proof that success doesn't require self-abandonment.**

---

## TEAM / PUBLIC VERSION

**We help six-figure female founders rewrite the inner narratives that keep them trapped by their own success. Our mission is to transform resentful high-achievers into sovereign CEOs who lead from fullness, not exhaustion. Because the hustle playbook is killing a generation of women entrepreneurs, and it's time someone told them the truth about why.**

scannerHits.evidence: When Sarah Chen isn't helping female founders rewrite t

business-abstract.content:
When Sarah Chen isn't helping female founders rewrite the stories that keep them stuck, you'll find her elbow-deep in clay at her pottery wheel, hiking Toronto's trails with her border collie, or pulling tarot cards to process whatever uncomfortable truth she's been avoiding that week.

Born in Taiwan and raised in Canada from age 8, Sarah learned early that achievement equaled worthiness — a lesson her parents drilled in with the best of intentions. She carried that programming straight into a successful career as a product manager at Shopify, then into building a consulting business that hit $420K. On paper, everything looked perfect. In reality, she was working 70-hour weeks, drinking herself to sleep, and quietly resenting every client revision request.

The wake-up call came when her therapist asked a simple question: "What would you do if you believed you were already enough?" Sarah didn't have an answer, and that terrified her. What followed were 2 years of deep inner work, ICF certification, and a complete business pivot to coaching women through the exact patterns that had nearly broken her.

Now she lives in Toronto with her partner and that same border collie, running Unbound Leadership with a mission that keeps her up at night in the best way: because the hustle playbook is killing a generation of female founders, and someone needs to tell them the truth about why their six-figure success feels like a prison they built themselves.

Sarah's the kind of person who'll call out your bullshit with a smile — and somehow make you grateful for it.

business-abstract.content:
# MAGNETIC MESSAGING MAP FOR SARAH CHEN

## 1. THE 10-ELEMENT MAP

**1. Skills:** IFS parts work, somatic nervous system regulation, identity-level transformation, pricing psychology, business operating systems integration

**2. Problems:** Income plateaus caused by self-worth tied to productivity, nervous system dysregulation from chronic overwork, inability to charge premium prices due to worthiness blocks, business decisions made from scarcity instead of self-trust

**3. Ideal Audience:** Women founders age 30-45 running service businesses making $150K-$500K who feel trapped by their own success

**4. Complaints:** No time for anything but client work, can't charge what she's worth, working 70-hour weeks, answering emails at 10pm, can't take time off without business anxiety

**5. Goals:** Permission to slow down, raise prices without guilt, take a month off without the business collapsing, run a business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment

**6. Unwanted Feelings:** Resentful, exhausted, invisible, lonely at the top

**7. Desired Feelings:** Spacious, grounded, self-trusting, proud

**8. Old Way:** Reading business books, joining Masterminds, following mindset coaches on Instagram, journaling sporadically, trying to fix behavior without addressing identity

**9. Your Way:** The Sovereignty Stack — three-layer integration of IFS parts work, somatic regulation, and business operating systems

**10. Aspiring Identity:** The Sovereign CEO — a woman who runs her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment

---

## 2. HELL ISLAND vs. HEAVEN ISLAND

**Hell Island:**
You're making $300K but working 70-hour weeks, drinking wine to fall asleep, and silently resenting every client revision request. Your Slack has 47 unread messages at 10pm, your husband asks "Why are you working Sunday again?" and you snap at your kids because of a client emergency. You've built a successful business that's slowly killing your soul, and the worst part is everyone thinks you should be grateful.

**Heaven Island:**
You run a business that funds your life instead of consuming it. You charge premium prices without guilt, take real vacations without checking email, and make decisions from self-trust instead of fear. Your nervous system is regulated, your boundaries are non-negotiable, and your success feels sustainable. You've become the Sovereign CEO who leads from fullness, not emptiness.

---

## 3. THE MAGNETIC MESSAGING STATEMENT

"Female founders making $150K-$500K, are you struggling with working 70-hour weeks, undercharging for your expertise, and having no time for anything but client work? And you feel resentful, exhausted, and lonely at the top? You need to stop trying to fix this with better time management and productivity hacks because the problem isn't your systems — it's your nervous system and self-worth patterns. And start using The Sovereignty Stack to integrate IFS parts work, somatic regulation, and business operating systems. When you do, you'll get permission to slow down, raise your prices without guilt, and run your business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment. You'll feel spacious, grounded, and proud and become The Sovereign CEO who leads from fullness, not emptiness."

---

## 4. PLATFORM VARIATIONS

**a) Ad Hook**
"Making $300K but working 70-hour weeks and resenting every client revision? The problem isn't your productivity — it's your nervous system."

**b) Social Media Post**
"Here's the uncomfortable truth: You didn't build a business, you built a high-paying prison. You're making good money but working 70-hour weeks, checking Slack at 10pm, and can't take a real vacation without anxiety. The solution isn't better time management — it's nervous system regulation and identity-level transformation. Ready to become The Sovereign CEO who runs her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment?"

**c) Email Subject Line + Preview**
Subject: "Why successful women founders burn out at 45"
Preview: "It's not what you think (and it's fixable)"

**d) Sales Page Hero**
"Stop building a business that's slowly killing your soul. Learn how to run a 7-figure company from self-trust instead of self-abandonment — without sacrificing your sanity, marriage, or nervous system."

**e) Long-Form Opening**
"Let me guess: You're making $300K but working 70-hour weeks. You drink wine to fall asleep, snap at your kids because of client emergencies, and your husband keeps asking why you're working on Sunday again. You've joined Masterminds, read every business book, and followed every mindset coach on Instagram, but you're still trapped in a cycle of overwork and undercharging. Here's what no one is telling you: The problem isn't your productivity, time management, or even your mindset — it's your nervous system and the unconscious belief that your worth equals your productivity. You need The Sovereignty Stack: a three-layer integration of IFS parts work, somatic regulation, and business operating systems that transforms you from a resentful high-achiever into The Sovereign CEO who leads from fullness, not emptiness."

---

## 5. ANTI-AVATAR STATEMENT

**This is NOT for you if:**
- You're looking for quick tactics and productivity hacks
- You think mindset work is "too woo" and want business strategy only  
- You're not willing to do deep inner work on your relationship with worthiness
- You're making under $150K and need basic business systems first
- You want someone to coddle you instead of telling you uncomfortable truths

---

## 6. "THIS IS FOR YOU IF..." STATEMENT

**This IS for you if:**
- You're making $150K-$500K but feel like your business owns you instead of the other way around
- You're tired of undercharging and overdelivering because you're afraid clients will leave
- You recognize that your income plateau is caused by internal patterns, not external strategies  
- You're ready to do the deep work on nervous system regulation and self-worth
- You want to build a business that funds your life instead of consuming it
